title: DisplayName
description: This mod allows you to change player display names via commands, seamlessly syncing the new nicknames across chat, tab lists, and nametags in real-time.
body:
This mode allows you to change the player display name through commands, seamlessly synchronizing new nicknames in real-time between chats, tab lists, and name tags. You can use the item to change the nickname. UI was created with Jetpack Compose and Material 3 through Composite mode.

## Dependencies
https://modrinth.com/mod/composite
https://modrinth.com/mod/pyke-lib

## Commands and Item Desc
```
/이름변경 <player> <displayname> : Change Player DisplayName
/이름변경 <player> : Open Chage DisplayName Screen

/give @s displayname:id_card : When Item Used Open Chage DisplayName Screen
```
![Change DisplayName Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d26bbc4f9974dd10bf52565f12e679d834ddb3b8.png)
